active_projects.note: Atlassian core + ShipIt 62 hackathon + Ghostweave client work + CreatorOS + Ghostweave revenue test (serious 3-4yr) + Talenode advisory + PatternOS + health training rebuild + Liminal Protocol. Job search closed (Expel declined, NW Mutual withdrawn). Energy freed for Ghostweave.

detail.name: Atlassian — People Core Data Model
detail.description: Building star schema (worker, position, dim/fact/ref tables) on the People Insights team. Navigating platform team review friction and data mesh architectural misalignment. Foundational work blocked for months; now in test phase.

detail.name: Atlassian — ShipIt 62 Hackathon
detail.description: TeamFlow pitch: maps internal Focus initiatives to human and AI capability requirements, suggests optimal team configurations with traditional vs AI-augmented org design toggle. Hackathon window: April 16-20. Note: High load overlap with Milwaukee Half.

detail.name: Ghostweave Intel (Canopy CRM)
detail.description: Cannabis sales CRM for BC client Scott Renouf. Single-file HTML/CSS/JS app live at Netlify. Features: visit priority scoring, Sample ROV metric, brand health scorecard, revenue forecasting. Active feature prioritization underway — real BCLDB sales data integration next. Data stored in Canada required (Supabase Canada Central).

detail.name: CreatorOS
detail.description: B2B intelligent messaging triage and CRM for adult content creators. Technical co-founder alongside Noelle. Architecture: Python, Telegram webhook, Together.ai API, Playwright for headless browser posting. GitHub scaffold exists. Pilot creator (Thrace) identified. Core positioning: intelligent niche CRM reducing human involvement where not needed, without dishonesty. Platform integration via headless browser (OnlyFans/Fansly).

detail.name: Talenode Advisory
detail.description: Serving as an advisor; currently reviewing/executing advisory contract.

detail.name: PatternOS
detail.description: Personal operating system design. Four-layer architecture (Capture, Process, Execute, Review) with Notion as connective tissue. Six named agents designed: Dispatch, Scout, Forge, Loom, Weld, Ledger. Claude Desktop + MCP servers for interactive orchestration, Railway for scheduled/webhook flows. JSON context files (career_compass, current_load, etc.) as structured memory layer.

detail.name: Ghostweave Labs — Revenue Test
detail.description: Serious 3-4 year test of whether Ghostweave can generate $60-80k/year revenue. Not a side interest — a real business test running parallel to Atlassian W2. 5-10 hours/week dedicated. September 2026 is the first checkpoint: is revenue trajectory real? If yes, plan a W2 transition. If no, stay W2 indefinitely and use data to decide. This is the alternative to the job search treadmill.

detail.name: Health Rebuild — Running
detail.description: Injury rebuild protocol. Milwaukee Lakefront Half Marathon on April 18 (imminent). Note: Overlap with ShipIt 62. Chiropractic treatment ongoing for hip/ankle/rib kinetic chain imbalances.

detail.name: Liminal Protocol
detail.description: Sci-fi worldbuilding and narrative project. Long-term creative output track. Low active priority but persistent background thread.

detail.name: Ghostweave Labs — Website / Brand
detail.description: Ghostweave.com redesigned with dark navy/teal palette. Positioning broadened from people analytics specialist to full-spectrum data professional. Copy voice: human, dry, no AI tells, minimal em dashes.

capacity_used.note: Job search closed — Expel declined, NW Mutual withdrawn. That 10% is now allocated to Ghostweave revenue test. Atlassian intentionally depressurized: 40 hours, good work, no heroics. ShipIt 62 (April 16-20) is a short-term spike. Overall load is lower than April 4 baseline.

atlassian_mode_note: Intentional shift. Work 40 hours. Do good work without heroics. Don't try to be indispensable. Let directs own their priorities. Stop taking personal responsibility for structural failures. Frame: CYA — do the job, don't save the world. RSU vests continue through Nov 2027 (~$197k unvested). Keep collecting until they make you go away.

items: Ghostweave scope boundary: productized tooling vs consulting-only vs hybrid — test both via revenue test
CreatorOS partnership structure with Noelle: co-founders, build-for-hire, or advisor — keep loose while she's a direct report
Ghostweave Intel engagement model with Scott: fixed scope vs retainer vs hybrid

september_2026_checkpoint.question: Can Ghostweave Labs (all projects combined) generate $60-80k/year revenue?
september_2026_checkpoint.if_yes: Real exit path exists. Plan part-time W2 + full-time indie, or full indie transition.
september_2026_checkpoint.if_no: Stay W2 indefinitely. Use the data to recalibrate scope — not a failure, just information.

weekly_notes: Job search closed. Career direction resolved: stay at Atlassian, test Ghostweave seriously, September checkpoint. ShipIt 62 (April 16-20) is a short-term load spike. Milwaukee Half (April 18) is imminent. New 6-week training program started April 13. Therapy work ongoing on validation pattern and identity. Depressurizing at Atlassian — this is a feature, not a bug.
